ArtifactUploadState.description: State model derived from ArtifactUpload TLA+ spec

UploadBeforeExit.description: Verifier for invariant UploadBeforeExit from ArtifactUpload spec

UploadAfterCore.description: Verifier for invariant UploadAfterCore from ArtifactUpload spec

ContainerExitRequiresUpload.description: Verifier for invariant ContainerExitRequiresUpload from ArtifactUpload spec

ValidWorkerPhase.description: Verifier for invariant ValidWorkerPhase from ArtifactUpload spec

ValidCoreResult.description: Verifier for invariant ValidCoreResult from ArtifactUpload spec

BoundedSteps.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedSteps from ArtifactUpload spec

assert_UploadBeforeExit.description: Test assertion for UploadBeforeExit from ArtifactUpload spec

assert_UploadAfterCore.description: Test assertion for UploadAfterCore from ArtifactUpload spec

assert_ContainerExitRequiresUpload.condition:
~container_up implies
        ( pending = {}                          and
          uploaded = ArtifactPatterns           and
          core_result in {"passed", "failed"}  )
assert_ContainerExitRequiresUpload.message:
Assertion failed: ContainerExitRequiresUpload — ~container_up =>
        ( pending = {}                          /\
          uploaded = ArtifactPatterns           /...
assert_ContainerExitRequiresUpload.description: Test assertion for ContainerExitRequiresUpload from ArtifactUpload spec
